title: Twelve arrests at al-Quds Day rally and counterprotest in London
description: Metropolitan police say they are also investigating chants led by Bobby Vylan at pro-Palestine protest next to Thames
content:
Twelve people were arrested as hundreds joined a pro-Palestinian al-Quds Day demonstration on one side of the Thames, while hundreds more gathered on the opposite bank to back Israeli and American attacks on Iran.
Al-Quds Day is an international demo... [5495 chars]

title: How UK might try to keep the Strait of Hormuz open
description: Donald Trump has urged the UK and other countries to send warships to the region to help secure shipping through the Strait of Hormuz after Iran closed the key passage.
content:
The UK military is considering the deployment of two drone types to the Middle East after the US asked allies for help to secure a key shipping lane in the region, it is understood.
Donald Trump has urged the UK and other countries to send warships t... [6822 chars]

title: Police investigate 'death to the IDF' chants led by Bobby Vylan at Al Quds Day rally
description: Around 1,000 officers managed protesters and counter-protesters on opposite sides of the River Thames.
content:
The Metropolitan Police says it is investigating chants of "death to the IDF [Israel Defense Forces]" led by Bobby Vylan, of the punk duo Bob Vylan, at an Al Quds Day protest in central London.
Hundreds attended static protests on Sunday after Home S... [2751 chars]

title: Ed Miliband says Labour will 'fight people's corner' on energy costs - but he doesn't say how
description: The energy secretary refused to be drawn on exactly how the government could help on energy costs. Sky News understands a support package for the poorest heating oil users could be announced on Monday.
content:
The energy secretary has told Sky News that the government will "fight people's corner" as the war in Iran threatens a fresh energy price crisis.
But, speaking to Sunday Morning with Trevor Phillips, Ed Miliband refused to be drawn on what support th... [2822 chars]

title: Tucker Carlson says Trump’s Justice Department is coming for him
description: Right-wing media personality has criticized president’s war with Iran as ‘absolutely disgusting and evil’
content:
Right-wing media commentator Tucker Carlson claims President Donald Trump’s Department of Justice could be building a criminal case against him.
In a clip shared Saturday evening on X, Carlson said the CIA is “preparing some kind of criminal referral... [2563 chars]
